title: Retail receipts to analytics on Databricks
summary: A regional retailer turns store, ecommerce, and mobile receipt events into governed analytics and operational receipt lookup services on a Databricks Data Lakehouse.
businessGoal: Reduce weekly margin reconciliation from two days to one hour while giving finance, merchandising, and support teams a trusted view of receipt-level sales, taxes, discounts, and returns.

components.name: Data Lakehouse
components.role: Organizes raw, refined, and business-ready receipt data in one governed architecture for analytics and downstream serving.

components.name: Delta Lake
components.role: Stores bronze receipt events, silver normalized line items, and gold aggregate tables with ACID transactions, schema evolution controls, and time travel for audit recovery.

components.name: Unity Catalog
components.role: Applies catalog, schema, table, lineage, masking, and access policies so receipt PII and tender data are discoverable but controlled.

components.name: Databricks SQL
components.role: Publishes governed dashboards for sales, basket mix, promotion leakage, tax reconciliation, and store exception review.

components.name: Lakebase
components.role: Serves low-latency operational receipt lookups for customer support and return authorization while sourcing trusted records from the lakehouse.

dataFlow: Receipt JSON and PDF-derived text land in bronze Delta Lake tables partitioned by ingestion date and source system.
Silver pipelines standardize store identifiers, timestamps, tax fields, SKU references, discounts, and tender metadata while quarantining malformed receipts.
Unity Catalog classifies customer identifiers and payment-adjacent fields, then enforces analyst, finance, and support access boundaries.
Gold marts summarize daily sales, return rates, tax variance, and promotion performance for Databricks SQL dashboards.
A curated receipt service table is synchronized into Lakebase for customer support search by receipt id, loyalty id, and return authorization id.
successMetrics: Receipt freshness is under 30 minutes for analytics and under five minutes for Lakebase support lookup extracts.
At least 99.5 percent of valid receipt events reach silver tables without manual intervention.
Databricks SQL finance dashboards reconcile gross sales, taxes, returns, and discounts to point-of-sale control totals within 0.2 percent.
Unity Catalog lineage shows source-to-dashboard traceability for each gold KPI table.
risks: Schema drift from point-of-sale firmware updates can break receipt parsing unless Delta Lake expectations and quarantine paths are enforced.
PII leakage is possible if Unity Catalog tags and grants are not reviewed before analyst access is opened.
Lakebase serving tables can diverge from lakehouse truth unless synchronization freshness and failure behavior are specified.

phases.focus: Confirm finance, merchandising, and support need governed receipt analytics plus operational lookup on the Data Lakehouse.
Plan Delta Lake quality gates, Unity Catalog policy reviews, Databricks SQL dashboards, and Lakebase serving synchronization.
Verify freshness, quarantine rate, reconciliation accuracy, lineage, and serving sync behavior before sign-off.
